Ad Text:
Help shape what’s next in practical AI delivery


At Altis, we’re looking for someone who can combine strong technical foundations, conceptual agility, and a modern consulting mindset to help solve real business problems with AI.

This is not a role for someone who wants to stay in one narrow lane. We’re looking for a highly adaptable technology generalist with a strong software engineering background, sharp problem-solving capability, and a genuine interest in applying AI in practical, commercially valuable ways.

You do not need to be a deep machine learning specialist or career data scientist. What matters more is your ability to move between business challenges and technical solutioning, work across different contexts, and turn ideas into outcomes that make sense in the real world.

What you’ll be doing

In this role, you’ll work across client and internal initiatives to design and deliver practical, end-to-end solutions that use AI and related technologies to improve processes, decision-making, and business outcomes.

Your role:

Work closely with stakeholders to understand business problems and translate them into practical technical solutions
Design and deliver end-to-end solutions in commercial, enterprise, or consulting environments
Apply AI and ML tools pragmatically to improve workflows, processes, and outcomes
Use AI development tools such as Claude to accelerate software delivery and improve productivity
Design and build practical applications that bring together business needs, software engineering, and AI capability
Contribute to the development of Azure web applications using .NET and C#
Move confidently between business context, solution design, and technical delivery
Bring a flexible, concept-driven approach to solving problems across different domains and client environments
Contribute to solutions that embed AI into real business settings, rather than focusing on research-led model development
Learn and apply new technologies quickly, adapting to different challenges and delivery contexts
Work with guidance from senior leaders while taking ownership of your contribution and delivery outcomes

What we’re looking for

We’re looking for someone who combines strong fundamentals with the adaptability to work across both technical and business contexts.

What you ideally bring:

A background in software development, software engineering, or solution delivery
Proven experience in software engineering
Proven experience designing and delivering solutions end to end
Experience building Azure web applications using .NET and C#
The ability to leverage AI tools such as Claude to accelerate software development
Exposure to AI/ML-enabled solutions, even if AI has not been your sole focus to date
Experience working in commercial, enterprise, or consulting environments
Strong conceptual thinking and the ability to apply transferable problem-solving approaches across different domains
The ability to work through ambiguity and shape practical outcomes from loosely defined challenges
Strong communication skills and the ability to engage with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
The maturity to work with direction and coaching, while still operating with initiative and flexibility

The mindset that matters

Technical capability is important, but it is only part of the picture.

We’re also looking for someone who brings:

Conceptual agility and the ability to recognise patterns across different business problems
Adaptability, with the confidence to move between technical detail, client needs, and broader business priorities
A strong foundational software engineering mindset
A commercial orientation and focus on real-world outcomes
Curiosity about how AI can be embedded into workflows and solutions
A strong learning mindset, with openness to coaching and growth
A practical, solutions-focused approach rather than a purely theoretical one

Why this role matters

This role is about helping bridge the gap between business opportunity and technical delivery.

You’ll play an important part in shaping how AI is applied in practical settings, helping clients and teams move beyond ideas into solutions that are useful, scalable, and outcome-focused. It’s a strong opportunity for someone who wants to work broadly, keep learning, and build capability in one of the fastest-evolving areas of technology.

Why join Altis?

At Altis, you’ll work with a team that values curiosity, innovation, and practical impact.

You’ll have the opportunity to solve real client challenges, contribute to the growth of our AI capability, and work across a mix of delivery, advisory, and capability-building activities. We’re a collaborative team that supports each other, encourages fresh thinking, and values people who can combine technical excellence with commercial and client awareness.

Your next chapter starts here

If you’re excited by the opportunity to design and deliver responsible, high-value AI solutions in a consulting environment, we’d love to hear from you.
